title: Flat User schema with single changeset
prompt: Design MyApp.Accounts.Person as a flat schema with email, name, phone. Provide one `changeset/2` that casts all three, marks email and name as required, and validates email format. No splitting needed — this is a simple person record. Use UTC timestamps. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/person.ex.
tier_rationale: Trivial flat-schema baseline. Easy because no structural decisions are needed.
